Privacy Policy

Last updated:

The Milton Montessori Family Hub is run by the Milton Montessori PTA to share school events, calendars, and volunteer opportunities with our families. We care about protecting your family's information and keep this policy short and plain.

What we collect

We only collect what you choose to type into our forms:

  • Volunteer sign-ups: your name, email address, phone number, the event you're interested in, and any message you add.
  • Event RSVPs: your name, email address, phone number, which event you're attending, the number of guests, and any notes.

We do not ask for or store payment details, and we do not knowingly collect information from children. Sign-ups are meant to be completed by a parent, guardian, or staff member.

How we use it

Your information is used only to organize PTA events and volunteering — for example, to know who is coming, to coordinate helpers, and to contact you about the event you signed up for. We do not sell, rent, or trade your information, and we do not use it for advertising.

Who can see it

Submissions are visible only to authorized PTA and school staff through a password-protected admin area. Access is limited to the people who need it to run events.

Where it's stored

Form submissions are stored securely with our hosting provider (Cloudflare) and are protected in transit using encryption (HTTPS). We keep sign-up and RSVP information for up to about 14 months so we can plan across a school year, after which it is automatically removed.

Cookies

We don't use tracking or advertising cookies. The only cookie we set is a temporary sign-in cookie for staff who log in to the admin area; it simply keeps them logged in during their session.

Other links

Our site links to outside services such as Procare, Instagram, and Facebook. Once you follow those links, their own privacy policies apply — not this one.

Your choices

You can ask us to see, correct, or delete any information you submitted. Just email us and we'll take care of it.

Contact

Questions about this policy or your information? Email the PTA at our contact address.

This policy may be updated from time to time. Any changes will appear on this page with a new date above.
